Localization.Description: Detected using WinExec utility (Kali) for remote command execution

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Detected the use of "WinExec" for remote execution of commands on the node {event_src.host} on behalf of the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name}
Detected the use of "WinExec" for remote execution of commands on the node {event_src.host} on behalf of the user {subject.account.name}
